data.body: First review BLOCK remediation: moved phase manifest formats, phase_status derivation, completion-verifier isolation, and all phase-compatibility consumer ACs to their owner 5967. This story now owns pin health only and leaves an explicit extension seam. Moved exact close wiring to 2bbd: transition_close.close_ticket calls the reusable close profile under require_plan_review_for_close before completion verification and again under lock; pin drift blocks there only when enforce_plan_material_pins is also true. Rerunning 75de before advancing.
